renalAdjustments.recommendation: Can cause hyperkalemia (by 2-3 fold) and acute kidney injury (by 2-fold). Use with caution due to increased risk of adverse effects. Monitor potassium levels closely.

drugs.sourceSnippet: Steroidal MRA, such as spironolactone and eplerenone, have established cardiovascular benefits in those with heart failure... However, their effects on kidney disease progression (eGFR decline or kidney failure) have not been examined in larger trials... the use of steroidal MRA also increases the risk of hyperkalemia (by 2–3 fold) and acute kidney injury (by 2-fold), and spironolactone can cause gynecomastia.
